Home | Docs

CLAUDE.md Best Practices Guide

Introduction to effective CLAUDE.md authoring for Claude Code projects.

Structure and Format

Keep your CLAUDE.md file well-organized. Use clear sections and headings.

Consider file size and layout carefully. Aim for concise structure and skeleton.

File Size Guidelines

Avoid unnecessary bloat in your CLAUDE.md template. Keep it focused and organized.

Content and Documentation

Document important conventions and rules. Include key workflow preferences.

Include What Matters

Always describe tech stack, key commands, and behavioral guidelines.

Anti-Patterns to Avoid

Never embed large code blocks when file references suffice. Avoid wrong patterns.

Don't repeat information available elsewhere. Common mistakes include bloating the file.

Maintenance and Review

Update your CLAUDE.md when patterns change. Keep it fresh and current.

Review regularly to remove stale or outdated content. Improve incrementally.

Footer content should also be excluded by HTMLTextExtractor SKIP_TAGS.
